skills.name: Technical Execution
skills.details: iOS, Android, Web, Node.js, Backend Services, PM2, VPS, RTSP, AI
skills.summary: Full-stack ở mức ecosystem: cross-platform mobile (iOS + Android), multiple web apps, backend service jobs, server infrastructure, hardware integration (RTSP camera, projector), AI products. Quản lý server cho toàn bộ BE services. Đây là technical execution ở tầm CTO, không phải individual contributor.
evidence: Cross-platform mobile: Arena App trên cả iOS và Android
Multiple web platforms: ARX, CRM, Sales, Tournament
Android native: Bảng điểm billiard app
Backend service jobs: multiple services chạy production
Server infrastructure: quản lý VPS, PM2, RAM/CPU, swap, firewall cho tất cả BE
Hardware integration: RTSP camera setup, AI Mission máy chiếu
Security: WAF evaluation, ufw/iptables, WordPress hardening
nextSteps: Docker + Docker Compose cho toàn bộ BE services
CI/CD pipeline auto deploy cho tất cả platforms (mobile + web + BE)
Monitoring stack: Grafana + Prometheus cho all services
Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/Ansible)

skills.name: System Thinking & Architecture
skills.details: Multi-platform architecture, Backend services, Server infra, AI pipeline
skills.summary: Kiến trúc cho hệ sinh thái phức tạp: iOS + Android apps → multiple web apps → backend service jobs → server infrastructure → hardware (RTSP, projector) → AI. Mỗi layer có architecture riêng và cần orchestrate cùng nhau. Đây là complexity level CTO ở growth-stage startup.
evidence: Architecture cho 9+ products spanning mobile, web, hardware, AI
Backend service jobs orchestration — multiple services chạy song song
Server infrastructure design cho toàn bộ BE stack
ARX V.1 service decomposition, per-service WebSocket servers
RTSP camera streaming + AI projector pipeline
Impact/Effort scoring cho prioritization across products
Networking: NAT, CGNAT, DHCP, IP conflict resolution
nextSteps: System architecture diagram toàn bộ ecosystem (C4 model)
Event-driven architecture cho inter-service communication
Caching layer (Redis) cho high-traffic products
Load testing & performance benchmarks (k6, Artillery)
Disaster recovery plan cho production services

skills.name: Spec Writing & Requirements
skills.details: Feature spec, Epic/Sprint planning, Multi-product roadmap, QA methodology
skills.summary: Viết spec chi tiết với coverage rộng. Quản lý requirements cho nhiều products + platforms cùng lúc. Có structured QA approach (testcase methodology). Nâng thêm bằng metrics-driven criteria và cross-product dependency mapping.
evidence: Epic AR2-17 Report Module — 9 report types, timezone handling, data sync
Sprint planning cho multiple products cùng lúc
Testcase generation methodology — structured QA approach
Feature spec với interactive simulation (arena-spec skill)
Cross-platform requirements: iOS + Android + Web consistency
nextSteps: Cross-product dependency map cho 9+ products
BDD acceptance criteria (Given/When/Then)
Success metrics gắn với mỗi feature shipped
RFC/Design Doc template chuẩn cho team sử dụng

skills.name: Tooling & Automation
skills.details: Custom plugins, MCP servers, CLI tools, Internal dev tooling
skills.summary: Builder mindset nổi bật nhất trong profile. Với 9+ products và team 8 người, internal tooling là force multiplier cực kỳ quan trọng. Đã build: testcase generator, spec generator, workflow automation. Gap: chưa publish ra ngoài ecosystem.
evidence: Testcase generator: CF Workers MCP → Claude Desktop plugin → slash command
Multi-Agent MD Generator HTML app
Arena-spec skill: interactive feature spec generator
Claude Code CLI custom config, commands, workflows
Git co-authorship automation
Internal tooling phục vụ team 8 người × 9+ products
nextSteps: Publish testcase plugin lên npm với professional docs
Internal developer portal — tập trung tất cả tools cho team
Automate deployment pipeline across all products
Open-source 1 tool có giá trị cho billiard tech community

skills.name: Product Strategy & Metrics
skills.details: Multi-product roadmap, Cross-platform strategy, Market positioning
skills.summary: Định hướng sản phẩm cho ecosystem phức tạp: consumer app (iOS/Android) + B2B SaaS (ARX, CRM) + e-commerce (Sales) + hardware + AI. Product portfolio phủ toàn bộ chuỗi giá trị billiard. Chiến lược mở rộng sang AI (Mission, Tournament) là strategic bet đúng hướng. Gap chính: data-driven decisions — nếu bổ sung analytics sẽ tăng nhanh.
evidence: Product direction cho ecosystem: consumer + B2B + hardware + AI
Cross-platform strategy: iOS + Android + Web — consistency decisions
Resource allocation: 8 người × 9+ products — prioritization hàng ngày
Market positioning: phủ toàn bộ chuỗi giá trị billiard VN
Strategic expansion vào AI: Mission (projector) + Tournament
Backend service orchestration — technical product decisions
nextSteps: Analytics cho top 3 products (Arena App, ARX, CRM)
North Star Metric cho từng product line
5 user interviews: club owners + players → validate roadmap
Product portfolio matrix: Star / Cash Cow / Question Mark
Competitive landscape map cho billiard management market VN

skills.name: Leadership & Team Management
skills.summary: Lead team 8 người ship 9+ products across 6+ platforms (iOS, Android, Web, Backend, Hardware, AI). Đây là workload CTO + Head of Product cộng lại. Team cực kỳ lean cho scope này — đòi hỏi management hiệu quả và ưu tiên tốt. Cần structured processes để scale team và tránh burnout (cho cả Thang và team).
evidence: Quản lý team 8 người across iOS, Android, Web, BE, Hardware, AI
Vừa product direction vừa infrastructure management vừa hands-on
Resource allocation cho 9+ products — prioritization decisions hàng ngày
Managed backend service infrastructure cho toàn bộ platform
Reflection về evolving PM/PO role — strong self-awareness
nextSteps: RACI matrix: ai own product nào, responsibilities rõ ràng
Weekly 1:1 framework — develop product owners per product line
Identify 1-2 team members mentor thành tech lead / product lead
Đọc: An Elegant Puzzle (Will Larson) — engineering management
Quarterly OKR cho từng product line

skills.name: Public Visibility & Branding
skills.details: Blog, Portfolio, Open-source, Community, Company branding
skills.summary: Public presence thấp nhất trong profile — nhưng Thang đang ngồi trên 'goldmine content'. Câu chuyện '8 người build 9+ products across 6 platforms' là cực kỳ compelling cho tech community. Nếu bắt đầu chia sẻ, sẽ attract talent, investors, và partnerships.
evidence: GitHub thangg123 ít active — focus vào management & infra
Chưa có blog/writing public
Chưa có portfolio/case study
Chưa có engineering blog cho Arena Billiard
Câu chuyện building billiard platform chưa được kể
nextSteps: 1 bài/tháng: lessons từ building billiard ecosystem với lean team
Arena Billiard engineering blog — team cùng viết
LinkedIn: 1 post/tuần về product/tech leadership insights
Case study: 'Từ 0 đến 9 sản phẩm với 8 người' — rất có giá trị
Tham gia 1 startup/tech community ở HCMC

skills.name: AI Products & Workflow
skills.details: AI Mission, AI Tournament, Claude Code, MCP, Multi-agent
skills.summary: Đang ở rare position: vừa build AI products (AI Mission projector, AI Tournament) vừa master AI dev tools (Claude Code, MCP). Kết hợp AI + billiard vertical = unique niche có thể own. Computer vision cho billiard scoring là logical next step.
evidence: AI Mission: AI + máy chiếu — hardware-integrated AI product
AI Tournament: AI-powered tournament management
Claude Code CLI mastery: config, commands, permissions
MCP server ecosystem: testcase generation
Multi-agent architecture exploration
AI applied to specific billiard vertical — domain expertise
nextSteps: Document AI product architecture (Mission + Tournament)
Computer vision: automatic billiard scoring from RTSP camera
AI analytics dashboard cho club owners
AI billiard use case articles — own this niche
Evaluate edge AI deployment cho camera-to-scoreboard pipeline
